description_long: This is a stylized ramen takeout container with a rectangular, slightly tapered shape and a wide open top. The exterior is decorated with horizontal orange and cream stripes, and the front features a large, smiling ramen bowl graphic above the word 'RAMEN' in bold orange letters. The container has two flaps on opposite sides, partially open, mimicking the look of a real takeout box. The interior is filled with a textured surface resembling uncooked ramen noodles, visible from the top. The overall design is playful and modern, with a focus on bold, simple graphics and a cheerful color palette.
description: A striped, orange-and-cream ramen takeout box with a smiling bowl graphic and visible noodles inside. The box features open side flaps and a playful, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'RAMEN' label, smiling bowl graphic, and one open side flap.
description_view_1: Side view with horizontal stripes and both flaps visible, but no text or graphics.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front but without the 'RAMEN' label or bowl graphic; one flap is open.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only stripes visible and both flaps partially open.
attribute_bowl_design: The container is made of cardboard with a rectangular, slightly tapered shape and a wide open top. Its exterior features bold horizontal orange and cream stripes, with a large, smiling ramen bowl graphic and the word 'RAMEN' on the front. The rim is simple and flat, and two side flaps are partially open, adding to the takeout box aesthetic.
attribute_topping_arrangement: There are no visible toppings arranged on the noodles; the surface appears uniform and textured, resembling plain, uncooked ramen. No distinct groupings or decorative arrangements are present.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are prominently displayed and fill the entire open top of the container, with their texture clearly visible above the rim.
attribute_broth_clarity: No broth is visible in the container; only the dry noodles are present, giving the appearance of an uncooked ramen package.
attribute_utensil_presence: No utensils such as chopsticks, spoons, or forks are present in or around the container in any of the images.
